name: dotnet-test
description: Run .NET tests, list test cases, and collect code coverage reports via Coverlet.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run dotnet test with optional filter. Returns pass/fail/skip counts and failure stack traces.

tools.name: list_tests
tools.description: List all available test names in a project or solution without running them.

tools.name: get_coverage
tools.description: Run tests with Coverlet and return code coverage percentages.
